description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Computer Reports: Added Bad Password Count and Bad Password Time to the column picker
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Trial Banner: Only shown when 7 days or less remain instead of the entire trial period
- Domain Connection: Group reports, GPO reports, ACL scanner, deleted objects reports, and DC enumeration reports now use Domain Settings instead of relying on the machine’s domain trust
- Domain Connection: Added LDAP-based domain controller discovery, removing dependency on Domain.GetCurrentDomain()
- Proxy Address Updater: CSV load no longer requires an AD connection. Usernames are parsed from the file and resolved at Preview time
- Download Logs: Now includes all log files (dated app logs, crash logs) instead of only the main app log and service logs
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Domain Settings: Test Connection now requires a password when a username is provided, instead of silently falling back to Windows credentials
- Report Sorting: Date/time columns now sort chronologically instead of alphabetically across all user and computer reports
- GetMaxPwdAgeTicks: Fixed overflow error when domain password policy is set to never expire
